description: Verify baseline: install dependencies, run existing tests, and cdk synth to confirm the project is in a green state before making changes.
steps: Run 'go mod download' in /projects/sandbox/cdk-sleep-go-kiro to fetch all Go dependencies
Run 'npm install -g aws-cdk' to ensure the CDK CLI is available
Run 'go test -v ./...' to confirm all existing tests pass
Run 'cdk synth' to confirm CDK synthesis succeeds
acceptance_criteria: cdk synth produces a CloudFormation template without errors
findings: Environment requires: (1) GOPROXY=direct for go mod download since storage.googleapis.com is blocked by proxy.golang.org redirect, (2) unset NODE_OPTIONS before running go test or cdk synth because NODE_OPTIONS is set to preload a non-existent /opt/amazon/kiro-agent/proxy-bootstrap.js file which breaks jsii runtime. All 17 existing tests pass. CDK synth succeeds.
